name: Burns Park
description: Scheduled to be completed on June 2023

name: Hays Senior Center
description: Come play pickleball at Hays Senior Center in North Little Rock, AR! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to water.

name: Henson Park Pickleball and Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Henson Park Pickleball and Tennis Courts in Sherwood, AR! There are 8 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Indianhead Park Pickleball Courts
description: Indianhead Park Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sherwood, AR. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Jess Odom Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Jess Odom Community Center in Maumelle, AR! There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Jim Dailey Fitness and Aquatic Center
description: Jim Dailey Fitness and Aquatic Center is a place to play pickleball in Little Rock, AR. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Kanis Park
description: Kanis Park is a place to play pickleball in Little Rock, AR. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Little Rock Racquet Club
description: Little Rock Racquet Club is a place to play pickleball in Little Rock, AR. There are 4 outdoor clay and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Meriwether Park
description: Meriwether Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Little Rock, AR. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts cannot be reserved. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Northshore Pickleball Courts
description: Northshore Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in North Little Rock, AR. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Rebsamen Tennis Center
description: Rebsamen Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Little Rock, AR. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Rowdy Hog Pickleball
description: Located in the Outlets of Little Rock next to Bass Pro, Rowdy Hog Pickleball: Experience the best in indoor pickleball at Rowdy Hog Pickleball! Our facility boasts four climate-controlled hard surface courts, perfect for year-round play. Enjoy a snack at our bar or shop for the latest paddles and accessories in our retail store, catering to beginners and pros alike. Come play, relax, and gear up with us! Please note: this is a cashless facility.
fees: Members only — Membership is free, pay to play.  Check out website for more details

name: The Athletic Clubs
description: The Athletic Clubs is a place to play pickleball in Little Rock, AR. There are 12 hard courts. 8 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, food, water, wheelchair accessibility, trainers or lessons, and locker rooms.

name: Thornhill
description: Come play pickleball at Thornhill in Sherwood, AR! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.
